scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend,rag" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "bun run --cwd backend dev" "bun run --cwd frontend dev" "cd backend/rag && .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe main.py"
scripts.rag:setup: python -m venv backend/rag/.venv && backend/rag/.venv/Scripts/pip.exe install -r backend/rag/requirements.txt
scripts.build: bun install --cwd frontend && bun run --cwd frontend build
